hero.headline: Revenue Problems Are Structural Before They Are Tactical.
hero.subhead: We bridge the 'Imagination Gap' between abstract strategy and measurable revenue. Using a 22-point structural diagnostic, I help you find the friction, fix what matters first, and build a system your team actually owns.

ideology.title: Five Stages. One Sovereign Engine.
ideology.subtitle: Stop optimizing individual tactics. We align your entire buyer journey into one coherent system that captures 12+ real-time signals across every stage.

stages.title: Awareness
stages.description: Bridge the gap between unknown and found. Get discovered by high-intent buyers before they ever talk to sales.

stages.title: Consideration
stages.description: Replace 'lazy design' with visual proof. Make it effortless for buyers to evaluate your approach and trust your process.

stages.title: Decision
stages.description: Remove the friction that stalls 70% of deals. Clear trust anchors and answering objections before they're asked.

stages.title: Conversion
stages.description: Turn signed deals into momentum. Smooth handoffs and behavior-based onboarding that protects the relationship.

stages.title: Retention
stages.description: Scale via system, not heroics. Surface risks early and grow accounts through orchestrated customer health signals.

about.title: Your Guide
about.name: Richard Norwood, PMP
about.bio: My approach to commercial systems is rooted in managing businesses as metrics. From facilitating community access to care in Alabama to leading continuous improvement and regional sales, my focus has always been on system-level enablement. As a certified Project Management Professional, I bring the delivery discipline that turns scattered activity into orchestrated outcomes.
